description: Use this API to replicate transaction event data in the form of a transactions data file. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rwmm(out, ofile)

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Name of the file to which data records are to be written (when out is 0). (input; no default allowed).

out.description: direct output to the data file specified by OFILE.
direct output to the current report device.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
